creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

	I was hoping that there would be a FreeBSD, NetBSD, OpenBSD
or even Linux version of their client software available for porting.
	However, after these many months, there has been none.
Can I move to close this PR?

	Regards,


-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - DF - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
Computer Science Undergraduate | FreeBSD Committer | CS Developer
flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
